sizing_formula: size_usd = clamp(PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD * tier_mult, 0, MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD); qty = size_usd / fill_px. Override: if signal.components['recommended_size_dollars'] present, size_usd = clamp(recommended_size_dollars, 0, MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD).
caps_enforced: PER_TRADE: MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD=100 — enforced at paper_exec.py:40 and paper_exec.py:76
LIQUIDITY: MIN_TOUCH_DEPTH_USD=200 depth gate — enforced at risk.py:188-190 before entry
gaps_closed: None — audit found sizing not bankroll-aware; this phase documents invariants. No broken rules found requiring immediate code change.
Documented: MIN_TOUCH_DEPTH_USD=200 > MAX_POSITION_SIZE_USD=100, so size never exceeds depth (safety property confirmed).
Documented: qty * entry_px = size_usd exactly (QTY_CONSISTENT_WITH_COMMITTED_USD confirmed).

gaps_remaining.description: No per-session total USD commitment cap. Only a count cap (MAX_CONCURRENT_TRADES=3). Max theoretical exposure = 3 x $100 = $300. Deferred to BANKROLL_SESSION_RULES_001.
Sizing is bankroll-agnostic. PAPER_POSITION_SIZE_USD is a fixed dollar amount independent of current bankroll balance or drawdown. Deferred to BANKROLL_SESSION_RULES_001.

worked_example: confidence=0.65, bankroll=$900, 1 open position, depth=$200 -> tier_mult=1.0 (conf < 0.70) -> size_usd=$50.00 -> qty=$50/fill_px. Bankroll not factored (documented gap).
